zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Calthorpe於大約1267年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可伯納姆 索普時，她的父親WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE27歲，母親Celia Burnham28歲。她於大約1287年與Edmund Hengrave在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1321年享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Calthorpe于大约1267年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可伯納姆 索普时，她的父亲WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE27岁，母亲Celia Burnham28岁。她于大约1287年与Edmund Hengrave在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1321年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Calthorpe was born about 1267, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE, was 27 and her mother, Celia Burnham, was 28. She married Edmund Hengrave about 1287, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1321, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Calthorpe est née environ 1267, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Celia Burnham, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Hengrave environ 1287, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1321, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Calthorpe um 1267 in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE 27 und ihre Mutter Celia Burnham 28. Sie hat um 1287 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Edmund Hengrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1321 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Calthorpe è nata il circa 1267 nel Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Celia Burnham, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Hengrave circa 1287, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1321, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Calthorpeが約1267年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペで生まれた時，父WILLIAM DE CALTHORPEは27歳，母Celia Burnhamは28歳であった。約1287年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズでEdmund Hengraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1321年に55歳で死去した。

ko.Hengrave Hall, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk,: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Calthorpe(이)가 대략 1267년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 번함 소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Celia Burnham(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 Edmund Hengrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1321년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Calthorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1267, em Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Celia Burnham, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Hengrave aproximadamente 1287, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1321, com 55 anos.

ru.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Calthorpe родилась около 1267 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени WILLIAM DE CALTHORPE было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Celia Burnham, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Hengrave около 1287 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1321 г. в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Edmund Hengrave aproximadamente 1287, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1321, a la edad de 55 años.
